findings.evidence: `rg` shows this declaration at line 37, while adjacent API uses names such as `condIndepFun_iff_condExp_inter_preimage_eq_mul` in `Mathlib/Probability/Independence/Conditional.lean:660` and many `condExp_*` lemmas; the only lowercase `condexp` hits are this new declaration/doc reference and a private local variable.
findings.fix: Rename it to use the established `condExp` spelling, e.g. `condIndep_of_indicator_condExp_eq`, and update the docstring reference.
findings.issue: `condIndep_of_indicator_condexp_eq` uses nonstandard lowercase `condexp` in the theorem name.

summary: The introduced API has one naming issue: it uses nonstandard `condexp` spelling where the surrounding Mathlib/TauCeti API consistently spells the operation `condExp`. No notation issues found.
